## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] This PR is limited to the requested change.
- [ ] App behavior is unchanged unless explicitly required.
- [ ] UI is unchanged unless explicitly required.
- [ ] No unrelated refactors were included.

## Checks

- [ ] I ran `npm run check`.
- [ ] GitHub Actions CI is expected to pass.

## Review

- [ ] The change is ready for user review.
- [ ] The user has reviewed the PR.
- [ ] The user has approved the PR.

## Merge Rule

Do not merge until the user has approved this PR.
